error.signature: RuntimeError: Sizes of tensors must match except in dimension 1. Expected 64 but got 32
error.regex: (Sizes of tensors must match|size mismatch|expected.*but got.*dimension|shape.*doesn.t match|mat1.*mat2.*cannot be multiplied)

verdict.summary: Tensor dimensions do not match for the operation. Wrong input size, missing reshape, or model architecture mismatch.

dead_ends.action: Add unsqueeze/squeeze randomly until shapes match
dead_ends.why_fails: Blindly changing dimensions produces numerically wrong results even if the operation succeeds

dead_ends.action: Transpose the tensor to swap dimensions
dead_ends.why_fails: Transpose changes semantic meaning (batch vs feature vs spatial). May run but produce garbage output.

workarounds.action: Print shapes at each layer to find where mismatch begins
workarounds.how: print(x.shape) after each layer; or use torchsummary: summary(model, input_size)

workarounds.action: Verify input dimensions match what the model expects
workarounds.how: Check model's first layer: nn.Linear(in_features=784, ...) needs input of shape (batch, 784)

workarounds.action: Use adaptive pooling before FC layers to handle variable input sizes
workarounds.how: nn.AdaptiveAvgPool2d((1, 1))  # outputs fixed size regardless of input spatial dims
